description: 10-ticket suite — title + framed description only (LLD-aligned expectations)

cases.title: VPN Connectivity Flapping
cases.description: Users reporting VPN disconnects every 15-20 minutes. VPN client logs show L2TP timeout errors at the corporate VPN gateway.

cases.title: Intermittent Office Wi-Fi
cases.description: Wi-Fi in the main lobby is dropping signal intermittently. Wireless coverage issue — possible channel interference affecting lobby access points.

cases.title: Server Room Cooling Alert
cases.description: DC-B HVAC unit reporting Compressor Failure. Server room temperature rising above 28°C — facility hardware emergency.

cases.title: Report Export Timeout
cases.description: Quarterly Financial Report export hangs in the reporting web application and returns HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout. Backend export job fails — application timeout, not a password or access request.

cases.title: Mobile App Login Loop
cases.description: iOS mobile application logs users out after every app suspension even when the session token is still valid. Auth session persistence bug in the mobile app wrapper.

cases.title: Broken CSS on Dashboard
cases.description: Admin Dashboard web application UI is completely unstyled. CSS asset files are not loading from the deployment CDN path after the latest release.

cases.title: Account Lockout - Repeated
cases.description: Security incident: user admin_jdoe locked out 4 times today despite correct password entry. Suspected malicious background service attempting repeated authentication.

cases.title: S3 Bucket Public Exposure
cases.description: Security monitor detected S3 bucket dev-logs-raw is publicly exposed. Unauthorized data access risk — apply Block Public Access and audit bucket logs immediately.

cases.title: Requested sudo access
cases.description: Access Management request: developer needs temporary sudo access to the prod-k8s-master node to investigate a bug. Standard privileged-access approval workflow — not an active breach.

cases.title: Query Performance Degradation
cases.description: PostgreSQL database query performance degradation: main Users table SELECT takes 12 seconds, previously 200ms. Suspect missing indices on the created_at column — run ANALYZE.
